Shortlisting_Methodology: Domestic shortlist through CAT + Academic Rating composite; separate overseas/GMAT route
Key_Factors: CAT cutoffs: CAT ≥95 overall; ≥85 sectional for General/EWS; category and PwD values also published separately
GMAT / GMAT Focus overseas route: GMAT Focus total 665; previous GMAT total 720; section minima published
Shortlist formula: Composite Score
Academic Rating methodology: AR = A+B+C+D+E
Work experience: 0.20×(months−11), capped at 5
Gender diversity: male = 0; all others = 3
Academic thresholds: Stream-wise P threshold and 80th-percentile bachelor threshold by category/group
Academic_Evaluation: Academic Rating methodology: AR = A+B+C+D+E; Academic thresholds: Stream-wise P threshold and 80th-percentile bachelor threshold by category/group
Work_Experience_Evaluation: Work experience: 0.20×(months−11), capped at 5
Diversity_Evaluation: Gender diversity: male = 0; all others = 3
Professional_Qualification_Rules: Lack of verified published data in production dataset
Important_Exceptions: Production values admit only verified official formula, AR, CAT cutoffs, work-experience, gender diversity, and academic-threshold mechanics.

Shortlisting_Methodology: Pre-PI composite score with CAT, academics, work experience/professional course, gender, and top-performer bypass
Key_Factors: Pre-PI score weights: CAT 55 + 10th 10 + 12th 10 + Bachelor 10 + WorkEx/ProfCourse 10 + Gender 5
CAT sectional composition: 19 / 21 / 15
Work-experience formula: 10x/36 for x<36; 10 at x≥36
Professional-course interaction: Higher of work-ex score or professional-course score
Standardization formula: Max[0,min{wt, wt/2 + ((val-mean)/sd)×wt/6}]
Direct PI bypass: Top-10 performers in certain categories automatically qualify for PI
Academic_Evaluation: Lack of verified published data in production dataset
Work_Experience_Evaluation: Work-experience formula: 10x/36 for x<36; 10 at x≥36
Diversity_Evaluation: Lack of verified published data in production dataset
Professional_Qualification_Rules: Professional-course interaction: Higher of work-ex score or professional-course score
Important_Exceptions: Current-cycle numeric CAT cutoffs were not admitted because the report found prior-cycle carry-forward.
Formula_Summary: Pre-PI = CAT 55 + 10th 10 + 12th 10 + Bachelor 10 + WorkEx/ProfCourse 10 + Gender 5

Shortlisting_Methodology: Stage-I CAT minimums followed by Stage-II shortlist score
Key_Factors: Stage-I CAT cutoffs: Open 85/80/80/75 and category-wise minima; actual shortlist cutoffs may be higher
Stage-II shortlist formula: CAT 56 + Class 10 10 + Class 12 15 + Gender 4
Class 10 brackets: 10/8/6/4/2/0
Class 12 brackets: 15/12/9/6/3/0
Gender diversity: 4 marks for female/transgender
Graduation and work experience in Stage-1: 0% weight in shortlist stage
Academic_Evaluation: Class 10 brackets: 10/8/6/4/2/0; Class 12 brackets: 15/12/9/6/3/0
Work_Experience_Evaluation: Lack of verified published data in production dataset
Diversity_Evaluation: Gender diversity: 4 marks for female/transgender
Professional_Qualification_Rules: Lack of verified published data in production dataset
Important_Exceptions: Graduation and work experience are verified as 0% in the shortlist stage.
Formula_Summary: Stage-II = CAT 56 + Class 10 10 + Class 12 15 + Gender 4

Shortlisting_Methodology: Composite shortlist score using scaled CAT, Class 12, graduation, work experience, and diversity factors
Key_Factors: Cutoffs: General MBA 90 overall / 85 sectional; separate MBA-ABM and MBA-SM cutoffs are published
Composite shortlist formula: 0.60 CS + 0.10 12M + 0.10 GM + 0.10 WE + 0.05 DFa + 0.05 DFb
CS formula: Scaled CAT = candidate CAT / highest CAT × 60
Class 12 percentile formula: 12M from five-year pooled board/discipline percentile
Graduation normalization: Discipline-wise normalized GM
Work-experience treatment: MBA formula from x>6; ABM zero; SM requires x>24
Diversity factors: DFa 5 and DFb 5
Academic_Evaluation: Class 12 percentile formula: 12M from five-year pooled board/discipline percentile; Graduation normalization: Discipline-wise normalized GM
Work_Experience_Evaluation: Work-experience treatment: MBA formula from x>6; ABM zero; SM requires x>24
Diversity_Evaluation: Diversity factors: DFa 5 and DFb 5
Professional_Qualification_Rules: Lack of verified published data in production dataset
Important_Exceptions: Program-specific MBA/MBA-ABM/MBA-SM nuances retained where explicitly verified.

Shortlisting_Methodology: Stage-II shortlist weights using school academics, CAT sectional components, diversity factor, and work experience
Key_Factors: CAT cutoffs: Gen/EWS 90/80; NC-OBC 80/70; SC 60/55; ST/PwD 45/40
Stage-II shortlist weights: 10th 10 + 12th 25 + VARC16 + DILR16 + QA23 + DF7 + WE0–3
Academic normalization: Z-score normalization for 10th and 12th
Graduation weight: 0% in stage-1 shortlist
COVID redistribution: Missing 10th/12th marks redistributed pro rata
Diversity factor weight: DF=7
Work-experience weight: WE0–3
Academic_Evaluation: Academic normalization: Z-score normalization for 10th and 12th; Graduation weight: 0% in stage-1 shortlist
Work_Experience_Evaluation: Work-experience weight: WE0–3
Diversity_Evaluation: Diversity factor weight: DF=7
Professional_Qualification_Rules: Lack of verified published data in production dataset
Important_Exceptions: Only official corrected category cutoffs and verified weights are admitted; unverified beneficiary and work-experience curve details are excluded.
Formula_Summary: 10th 10 + 12th 25 + VARC16 + DILR16 + QA23 + DF7 + WE0–3

Shortlisting_Methodology: Aggregate Index Score using CAT, Class X, Class XII, diversity, and work experience after registration stage
Key_Factors: CAT thresholds: 85 overall and common sectional threshold of 75 for General; OBC-NCL/EWS 75/65; SC 65/55; ST/PwD 55/45
AIS weights: CAT 50 + Class X 15 + Class XII 20 + Gender 10 / Academic 5 + WorkEx 5
Class X normalization: Divide by board highest and multiply by 15
Class XII normalization: Divide by board-stream highest and multiply by 20
Gender / academic diversity: Gender 10, academic diversity 5, non-stacking
Work-experience curve: Peaks at 35–36 months at 5 points
Academic_Evaluation: Class X normalization: Divide by board highest and multiply by 15; Class XII normalization: Divide by board-stream highest and multiply by 20
Work_Experience_Evaluation: Work-experience curve: Peaks at 35–36 months at 5 points
Diversity_Evaluation: Gender / academic diversity: Gender 10, academic diversity 5, non-stacking
Professional_Qualification_Rules: Lack of verified published data in production dataset
Important_Exceptions: The institute-native shortlist stage is Stage 2; production data uses pre-interview shortlist concept.
Formula_Summary: AIS = CAT 50 + Class X 15 + Class XII 20 + Gender 10 / Academic 5 + WorkEx 5
